docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO CONTRACT FILED BY PETITIONER CHING, CARA HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CARA CHING'S HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO CONTRACT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 5, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE AND TO FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1290.4. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/MJM)
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-05-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER CHING, CARA

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CARA CHING'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO CONTRACT IS OFF CALENDAR. THIS MATTER WAS CONTINUED FROM NOVEMBER 5, 2013 FOR PETITIONER TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1290.4. PETITIONER FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT MAIL SERVICE OF THE PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION COMPLIED WITH CCP 1290.4. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CARA CHING'S Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract is off calendar. This matter was continued from November 5, 2013 for Petitioner to provide a proof of service in compliance with CCP 1290.4. Petitioner failed to demonstrate that mail service of the petition to compel arbitration complied with CCP 1290.4. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Continued To Dec-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY BULLIUNG, TEL. NO. 841-9000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER CARA CHING's Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration Pursuant To Contract is continued to December 5, 2013. Counsel to give notice of the new hearing date and to file a Proof of Service pursuant to CCP 1290.4. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
